description: Regression cases for real defects found and fixed this session, plus a baseline structural invariant. These are the cheapest, highest-confidence golden cases: each locks down a verified bug so it can never silently return.

cases.name: regression_persona_prompt_matches_the_storys_cloud
cases.labelled_by: QE lead — verified defect: the developer persona prompt asked about 'SALES rollup configuration', a domain error (rollup is an FSC concept). Fixed to be cloud-appropriate.

acceptance_criteria: The opportunity stage advances only when required fields are complete

cases.name: regression_dod_never_preasserts_the_answer_to_an_open_question
cases.labelled_by: QE lead — verified defect: the Definition of Done asserted '0.00 variance' reconciliation while the reconciliation tolerance was simultaneously listed as an open question — a self-contradiction. Fixed: the DoD item now points at the open question instead of pre-answering it.

acceptance_criteria: The household rollup total equals the sum of active accounts

cases.name: baseline_structural_invariant
cases.labelled_by: QE lead — the session always produces a real example map and agreements log; verdict is always PASS (facilitation never fails, it only surfaces open questions)

acceptance_criteria: The household rollup total equals the sum of active accounts
